2.0.3.en: Switched to Device switch_mode endpoint. Simplified authentication with automatic password suffix. Updated dependencies and removed deprecated node-fetch.

2.0.4.en: Added standalone API test script for testing before deployment. Simplified settings UI. Updated all dependencies to latest versions.

2.1.0.en: fix: add missing password suffix to Homey app auth header - Fixed bug where password alias! suffix was missing in app.js authentication - This caused Homey app to fail while local tests succeeded - Password suffix is now consistently applied in both contexts - Updated all packages to latest compatible versions - Fixed ESLint configuration for API field naming - Bumped version to 2.0.5

2.2.0.en: feat(flow): add group status condition and local status test tooling
